title: pyrus reducta
side_effects: Pyrus reducta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal irritation, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high concentration of tannins. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to kidney and liver damage, as the body struggles to process its toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Pyrus reducta can result in respiratory problems, including coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath. Furthermore, excessive exposure to the plant's chemicals can also trigger allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling.
